summary: Comprehensive testing of 4 NEW features: Acupressure & Massage, Reiki & Aura Readings, Try Something New discovery, and Daily Wellness Ritual Builder. All 24 backend tests passed (100%). All 4 frontend pages working correctly with proper navigation integration.
seed_data_creation: Test acupressure sessions and reiki healing sessions created during testing (prefixed with TEST_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: 4 new feature modules fully functional: Acupressure (10 points, 6 routines), Reiki (7 chakras, 10 positions, AI aura readings), Discover (exploration tracking), Daily Ritual (personalized morning/evening rituals). All regression tests pass.

GET /api/acupressure/points.structure: id, name, location, meridian, element, color, technique, benefits, conditions, caution, depth, duration, spiritual

GET /api/acupressure/routine/stress_reli.returns: Routine with points_detail array containing full point objects

GET /api/acupressure/point/li4.returns: He Gu point detail with all properties

frontend_page.detail_panel: Working - shows location, pressure, technique, conditions, duration, spiritual, caution

GET /api/reiki/positions.structure: id, name, placement, chakra, duration, intention, sensations

POST /api/reiki/aura-reading (authentica.returns: aura_color, aura (name, meaning, strengths, shadow, advice), chakra, reading, id
POST /api/reiki/aura-reading (authentica.ai_integration: GPT-5.2 via Emergent LLM key with fallback response

frontend_page.aura_reading: Working - birth date selectors, AI-generated reading with fallback
frontend_page.chakra_display: 7 chakras with color, location, frequency, qualities
frontend_page.positions_display: 10 hand positions with placement, intention, sensations

GET /api/discover/suggestions (authentic.returns: suggestions array, total_features, explored count, unexplored count, exploration_percent

frontend_page.authenticated: Shows exploration progress bar, mood-based recommendations, unexplored features
frontend_page.exploration_tracking: Working - shows X of 23 features explored

GET /api/daily-ritual/generate?time_of_d.returns: id, time_of_day, ritual with steps array, profile_snapshot, completed_steps
Evening ritual with different steps (calming breath, yin restore, etc.)

frontend_page.ritual_steps: 8 personalized steps with type, name, duration, instruction
frontend_page.step_completion: Working - checkmark appears, progress bar updates
frontend_page.personalization: Shows level, streak, mood in progress section

pages_tested: /acupressure - 10 point cards, 6 routine cards, detail panel working
/reiki - 3 tabs (Aura, Chakras, Positions), AI aura reading working
/discover - Progress bar, mood recommendations, suggestion cards
frontend_tests_summary.navigation_verified: My Ritual first, More dropdown has Try New, Acupressure, Reiki & Aura
